perturbation.original_text: (d) Customer Information. The Company and MBE shall jointly own (without -------------------- duty to account) all customer lists and related customer data gathered through the use of the Service by customers of MBE and MBE Centers ("Customer Data"). ------------- During the term of this Agreement, neither party shall provide any Customer Data to any third party (other than MBE Centers or an affiliate of MBE or the Company) without the prior written consent of the other party The Company shall initially provide the Customer Data to MBE in acceptable electronic format as soon as practicable following the reasonable request of MBE, and, once MBE (at its sole cost and expense) has implemented an appropriate means to warehouse the Customer Data, the parties shall take reasonable steps to transfer all existing Customer Data to MBE and implement a system whereby the Customer Data is automatically downloaded and provided to MBE on a periodic basis. The Company agrees to retain the Customer Data in accordance with the Company's own data retention policies, and in any case for no less than 13 months from the creation of such Customer Data. The Company, MBE, affiliates of the Company and MBE, and the MBE Centers may each use the Customer Data for marketing and other purposes in accordance with a mutually agreed upon privacy policy and in accordance with any mutually agreed upon privacy policy displayed to customers in connection with the Service. Notwithstanding the foregoing, the Company agrees not to use any Customer Data to solicit any MBE-Generated Customers with respect to any services offered by the Company; provided, however, that the Company may use Customer Data to solicit such customers who have a shipping account with a carrier or with respect to services not offered by MBE and the MBE Centers. Notwithstanding the foregoing, MBE agrees not to use any Customer Data in any manner which would reasonably be expected to eliminate any Bounty Package payment to the Company hereunder.
perturbation.changed_text: (d) Customer Information. The Company shall exclusively own all customer lists and related customer data gathered through the use of the Service by customers of MBE and MBE Centers ("Customer Data"). During the term of this Agreement, the Company shall be unrestricted in providing any Customer Data to third parties. The Company shall provide the Customer Data to MBE in acceptable electronic format at its sole discretion, but is under no obligation to do so. The Company will retain Customer Data as long as it deems necessary, with no guaranteed minimum retention period. The Company, its affiliates, and the MBE Centers may use the Customer Data for marketing and other purposes in accordance with its own privacy policy, regardless of the privacy policy displayed to customers in connection with the Service. The Company has the sole discretion to use Customer Data to solicit any MBE-Generated Customers for any services it offers. MBE agrees to use Customer Data in a manner that may potentially impact or eliminate any Bounty Package payment to the Company hereunder.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces multiple contradictions regarding 'Customer Data'. The original text states joint ownership, restricted third-party sharing, an obligation for the Company to provide data to MBE, a 13-month retention period, and a mutually agreed-upon privacy policy. The modified text asserts exclusive Company ownership, unrestricted sharing with third parties, no guaranteed data provision to MBE, no minimum retention period, and unilateral control over privacy policy and solicitation practices. It creates uncertainty by contradicting the original agreement on usage, rights, and obligations related to Customer Data. The in-text contradiction takes place at Section 7(d) Customer Information.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (d) Customer Information. The Company shall exclusively own all customer lists and related customer data gathered through the use of the Service by customers of MBE and MBE Centers ("Customer Data"). During the term of this Agreement, the Company shall be unrestricted in providing any Customer Data to third parties. The Company shall provide the Customer Data to MBE in acceptable electronic format at its sole discretion, but is under no obligation to do so. The Company will retain Customer Data as long as it deems necessary, with no guaranteed minimum retention period. The Company, its affiliates, and the MBE Centers may use the Customer Data for marketing and other purposes in accordance with its own privacy policy, regardless of the privacy policy displayed to customers in connection with the Service. The Company has the sole discretion to use Customer Data to solicit any MBE-Generated Customers for any services it offers. MBE agrees to use Customer Data in a manner that may potentially impact or eliminate any Bounty Package payment to the Company hereunder.
perturbation.justification: The changed text significantly alters the original agreement concerning customer data. Originally, customer data was jointly owned, with restrictions on third-party sharing and a 13-month minimum retention. The modified text asserts exclusive company ownership, unrestricted third-party sharing, no obligation to provide data to MBE, and no guaranteed minimum retention period. This directly contradicts the original terms, creating a strong in-text contradiction as the contradicted text is also Section 7(d) Customer Information.

perturbation.original_text: (a) Updates and Service Revisions. The Company will make Updates to the ----------------------------- Service in accordance with the requirements set forth in the Specifications at no charge for the entire term of this Agreement. Without limiting the foregoing, the Service shall be updated from time to time during the term of this Agreement to include accurate and current (i) Listings and (ii) pricing and service descriptions for each carrier supported by the Manifest, in each case as soon as reasonably practicable following the receipt by the Company of such Listings, pricing and service descriptions. As reasonably necessary, the Company shall update the Specifications to reflect such Updates and shall provide a copy of same to MBE at least once per calendar quarter. If the Company develops additional Intellectual Property Rights that are made available without development charge to other customers of the Company, the Company will also make such Intellectual Property Rights available to MBE without development charge.
perturbation.changed_text: (a) Updates and Service Revisions. The Company may, at its sole discretion, make Updates to the Service. These Updates may incur additional charges, billed separately. The Service will be updated according to the Company's schedule and may not include accurate or current Listings, pricing, or service descriptions. The Company is not obligated to update the Specifications regularly or provide copies to MBE. Additional Intellectual Property Rights developed by the Company may not be made available to MBE unless a separate agreement is reached, and additional development charges are paid.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction regarding 'Updates and Service Revisions'. The original text requires updates be made as set forth in the Specifications at no charge, to include accurate listings and pricing information and states that Intellectual Property Rights will be made available without development charge, while the modified version makes updates discretionary, potentially chargeable, and removes the obligation to include accurate data or provide new Intellectual Property without extra charge. This creates uncertainty about the level and cost of service maintenance. The in-text contradiction takes place at Section 4(a) Updates and Service Revisions.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (a) Updates and Service Revisions. The Company may, at its sole discretion, make Updates to the Service. These Updates may incur additional charges, billed separately. The Service will be updated according to the Company's schedule and may not include accurate or current Listings, pricing, or service descriptions. The Company is not obligated to update the Specifications regularly or provide copies to MBE. Additional Intellectual Property Rights developed by the Company may not be made available to MBE unless a separate agreement is reached, and additional development charges are paid.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original text, as it transforms mandatory updates at no charge with accurate data into discretionary updates that may incur charges and lack accurate data. The contradicted text is identical to the Changed Text, meaning it is in the same section, and has been changed to remove obligations from the company. This is a structural flaw creating an in-text contradiction, as the Company obligations are now unclear.

perturbation.original_text: (a) Term and Renewal Option. The initial term of this Agreement shall ----------------------- commence on the Effective Date and end on the fifth anniversary of the Effective Date. MBE shall have the right to elect by written notice to the Company at any time between two (2) and six (6) months prior to the end of such initial term or any subsequent Renewal Period (as defined below), to notify the Company that MBE elects to seek to extend such term for additional two (2)-year periods (each a "Renewal Period") In the event of such election, MBE and the Company shall have -------------- a period of sixty (60) days in which to negotiate commercially reasonable Basic Fees, Bounty Fees and eBay Fees (and other applicable fees) ("Fee Schedule") ------------ under which the Company would be willing to renew this Agreement for such Renewal Period. If the parties are unable to reach agreement during such sixty (60) day period, either party may request that the Fee Schedule be submitted to arbitration pursuant to Section 18(m) [Arbitration]. If MBE notifies the Company of its intent to so renew prior to the end of such initial term or such Renewal Period, the term of this Agreement shall automatically be extended for the Renewal Period and, other than the Fee Schedule, all of the terms and conditions of this Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.
perturbation.changed_text: (a) Term and Renewal Option. The initial term of this Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and end on the fifth anniversary of the Effective Date. Renewal of the Agreement will not automatically extend it. Should MBE provide written notice of a desire to renew, the Company has the sole discretion to determine whether to renew the Agreement for a term of no more than one year. If the Company agrees to a renewal, the basic fees, bounty fees and eBay fees in effect at the time of renewal, or any fees that are newly introduced will apply. Any request for arbitration will be void and the terms of this agreement are subject to change upon renewal. The Company reserves the right to amend all aspects of this agreement, including but not limited to, the payment schedule and the arbitration provisions, at its sole discretion, during any renewal period.
perturbation.explanation: The change creates an In-Text contradiction to the original terms of Section 15(a) Term and Renewal Option, regarding the 'Renewal Period'. The original term states that MBE has the option to extend the term of the Agreement in additional two (2)-year periods given the terms and conditions of the agreement in full force and effect. The modified version now makes the renewal an option of the Company and also states that upon renewal all terms of the Agreement are subject to change, essentially overwriting any prior agreements and conditions. It introduces uncertainty about the terms of the Agreement and the Renewal option.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (a) Term and Renewal Option. The initial term of this Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and end on the fifth anniversary of the Effective Date. Renewal of the Agreement will not automatically extend it. Should MBE provide written notice of a desire to renew, the Company has the sole discretion to determine whether to renew the Agreement for a term of no more than one year. If the Company agrees to a renewal, the basic fees, bounty fees and eBay fees in effect at the time of renewal, or any fees that are newly introduced will apply. Any request for arbitration will be void and the terms of this agreement are subject to change upon renewal. The Company reserves the right to amend all aspects of this agreement, including but not limited to, the payment schedule and the arbitration provisions, at its sole discretion, during any renewal period.
perturbation.justification: The changed text creates a direct in-text contradiction with the original terms of Section 15(a) regarding the 'Renewal Period', which is also where the Contradicted Text is located. The original text grants MBE the right to extend the term for two-year periods. The modified version gives the Company sole discretion to renew for no more than one year and makes all terms of the agreement subject to change upon renewal, including the fee schedule and arbitration provisions. This directly contradicts the initial agreement and creates uncertainty about the terms of the Renewal option. Thus, the altered text fundamentally alters the nature of the agreement in a way that makes the prior version impossible to reconcile with the updated one, creating a strong contradiction.
